title: Design System: Pi Jam Idea Bank

shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Default dashboard cards and structural panels.

shadows.name: active-lift
shadows.purpose: Interactive elements during hover or active drags.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Standard call-to-action button with micro-scaling and smooth transitions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #5BA4C7; color: #FFFFFF; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 0.975rem; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.1s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.70 0.10 250); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Acrylic Container Card
components.description: Premium glassmorphic panel overlaying the background gradient.
components.html:
Overview

Nurturing Design-Driven Education and Computational Thinking.
components.css: .ds-acrylic-card { backdrop-filter: blur(12px); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85); border: 1px solid rgba(226, 232, 240, 0.4); border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); } .ds-card-title { font-family: sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1.25rem; color: #0F172A; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-text { font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 0.975rem; color: #475569; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: The visual language of the Pi Jam Idea Bank is designed to evoke a modern, tactile, and professional classroom laboratory environment. It shifts away from basic white panels toward dynamic, translucent glassmorphism overlays floating gracefully over high-fidelity animated gradient backdrops. This depth stimulates students' spatial curiosity, aligning with design-thinking, computational thinking, and hands-on making.
keyCharacteristics: Translucent Depth: Translucent layout shells and cards overlaying floating fluid gradients.
Micro-Animated Feedbacks: Fast, non-elastic scale-downs on active states to make the interface feel highly responsive.
Clean Structure: Flat layouts with extremely fine slate borders for precise structural alignment.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: The primary accent Teal-Blue is used on <=10% of any given dashboard screen. Its visual rarity is what creates instant structural focus.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: Fills and borders are tinted slightly toward the brand accent (utilizing slate-50/100/200 palettes) to avoid clinical, desaturated grays.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Elements sit flat on their glass canvas. Elevation increases only as a reactive state changes (such as hover scale shifts).

dos: Do use translucent glass cards (backdrop-blur-md bg-card/85) to overlay the floating fluid gradients.
Do keep the brand Teal-Blue reserved for functional elements (buttons, active status, inputs).
Do use standard 10px corner roundness consistently across all panels.
donts: Don't use colored accent stripes on borders greater than 1px (e.g. standard SaaS card left borders).
Don't repeat identical card grids endlessly; vary columns and components to maintain rhythm.
Don't default to modals; prioritize inline forms and layouts.
Don't use em-dashes (—) or double-hyphens (--) in copy.
